items.title: New: Which soon-to-be free agents could be the next Dominick Barlow or Jabari Walker?
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt:
New: Which soon-to-be free agents could be the next Dominick Barlow or Jabari Walker?

A whole lot of words about the standout names on the two-way contract market, where the Sixers found significant value during Daryl Morey’s tenure. Can they keep it up?

www.phillyvoice.com/sixers-news-...

media.title: Which free agents could be the Sixers' next two-way contract success stories?
media.description: Can the Sixers find their next Dominick Barlow or Jabari Walker on the two-way market this summer?
